attacks.name: Dress Up
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool card attached to it, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Precious Ribbon
attacks.effect: Move a Fairy Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, heal 50 damage from that Pokémon.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Brilliant Arrow
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage times the amount of Fairy Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.

rules:
Mega Evolution rule: When 1 of your Pokémon becomes a Mega Evolution Pokémon, your turn ends.

Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Life Leap
attacks.effect: Heal from this Pokémon the same amount of damage you did to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Shining Wind
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon has no Weakness.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Nuzzle
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

flavorText: A yellow body is proof of good health. If you touch its bright-red cheeks, you'll see its shining, smiling face!

attacks.name: Blaze Ball
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

Search your deck for a card that evolves from 1 of your Pokémon (excluding Pokémon-EX) and put it onto that Pokémon. (This counts as evolving that Pokémon.) Shuffle your deck afterward. You can use this card during your first turn or on a Pokémon that was put into play this turn.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Attach a Pokémon Tool to 1 of your Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it.

At the end of your opponent's turn, heal 20 damage from the Basic Pokémon this card is attached to.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

attacks.name: Warble
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 2 Fletchling, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: Little friends, thanks for always helping me look so cute!

attacks.name: Fairy Friend
attacks.effect: If you have any Fairy Pokémon on your Bench, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavorText: This fluffiness makes everyone go crazy. Is it really that charming?

attacks.name: Bind Wound
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.

flavorText: Wings and beaks. I like yours, and I like mine, too.

attacks.name: Sparkle
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Diamond Storm
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from each of your Fairy Pokémon.

flavorText: Open the magic door and a dream-colored party will start again today. I'll teach you the secret password.

attacks.name: Dress Up
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool card attached to it, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Precious Ribbon
attacks.effect: Move a Fairy Energy from this Pokémon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, heal 50 damage from that Pokémon.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Lap Up
attacks.effect: Draw 3 cards.

flavorText: The cakes Slurpuff makes always look just like that one Pokémon it likes.

attacks.name: Lick Away
attacks.effect: Remove all Special Conditions from this Pokémon.

flavorText: My fluffy heart makes me feel like a marshmallow. A thrilling macaron full of colorful magic. Everybody's crazy about the taste of candy! ☆

attacks.name: Petal Blizzard
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: The five of us team up to be the Pretty Young Girl Force! We'll show you some beautiful moves!
It's OK. No one will take away your flower. You look cute even when you're angry.

attacks.name: Oblivion Wing
attacks.effect: Attach a Darkness Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Darkness Blade
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this Pokémon can't attack during your next turn.

flavorText: Hidden away in its jet-black wings is a red passion.

attacks.name: Ear Influence
attacks.effect: Move as many damage counters on your opponent's Pokémon as you like to any of your opponent's other Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Psychic
attacks.effect: Does 10 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: Intense silence. Two lamplights. Keep waiting for night to end.

attacks.name: Twinkle
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavorText: My number one. Exceptionally cute. A little princess.

attacks.name: Wish
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a card and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: The twinkle of the stars. The destiny of love. A miracle that grants wishes in the night sky.

attacks.name: Starvin'
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: When Mom gets in the kitchen, the happiest things happen. I can feel my mouth watering!

attacks.name: Psychic Assault
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 more damage for each damage counter on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavorText: When she's surrounded by cushions and dressers that I like, she looks just like a princess!

attacks.name: Rest
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon. This Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Pachi
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

flavorText: Crackle…buzz…Dedenne…?! Beep…

attacks.name: Circle Circuit
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage times the number of Pokémon on your Bench.

attacks.name: Thunderbolt
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: The plan for today is to do nothing. My awesome tail is all curled up, and my ears are tired, too.

attacks.name: Snowy Drop
attacks.effect: Put 4 damage counters on your opponent's Pokémon in any way you like.

flavorText: Spring is already here, so goodbye…
What a delicious-looking snowman! I think I'll sneak a bite. It's OK…no one's looking, right?

attacks.name: Blaze Ball
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Recall
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of this Pokémon's attacks from its previous Evolutions and use it as this attack.

attacks.name: Combustion Blast
attacks.effect: This Pokémon can't use Combustion Blast during your next turn.

flavorText: No matter what happens, if we stick together, we can get past it. Forever and ever.

attacks.name: Call for Support
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Supporter card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: My precious friend who is always with me. I have so many things I want to tell you.

attacks.name: Playful
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage times the number of damage counters on this Pokémon.

flavorText: My Charmander is so rambunctious! I wonder if we can become good friends?

attacks.name: Worry Seed
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.

flavorText: I wonder if I would look a little cuter with a beautiful flower?

attacks.name: Run Around
attacks.effect: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavorText: Running around, climbing trees, playing hide-and-seek! Another wonderful day begins!

rules: Double Colorless Energy provides ColorlessColorless Energy.

Discard an Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Discard an Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 5 cards.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Your opponent shuffles his or her hand into his or her deck and draws 4 cards.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Put 2 Grass Pokémon from your discard pile into your hand.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Heal 60 damage and remove all Special Conditions from 1 of your Pokémon.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, heal 30 damage from the Pokémon you moved to your Bench.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Put a Pokémon from your discard pile on top of your deck.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Shuffle 2 cards from your hand into your deck. (If you can't shuffle 2 cards into your deck, you can't play this card.) Then, draw a card.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Your Active Pokémon is now Confused.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

Search your deck for a card that evolves from 1 of your Pokémon and put it onto that Pokémon. (This counts as evolving that Pokémon.) Shuffle your deck afterward. You can't use this card during your first turn or on a Pokémon that was put into play this turn.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Move a basic Energy from 1 of your Pokémon to another of your Pokémon.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.

You may play as many Item cards as you like during your turn (before your attack).

Search your deck for up to 4 Lightning Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn (before your attack).

attacks.name: Sleepy Press
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon. This Pokémon is now Asleep.

flavorText: It is not satisfied unless it eats over 880 pounds of food every day. When it is done eating, it goes promptly to sleep.

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Seething Anger
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each damage counter on this Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: After heightening its will to fight by whipping itself with its three tails, it charges at full speed.

attacks.name: Fury Attack
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: An odd species that is rarely found. The three heads respectively represent joy, sadness, and anger.

attacks.name: Double Stab
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Doduo Delivery
attacks.effect: Draw 2 cards.

flavorText: The brains in its two heads appear to communicate emotions to each other with a telepathic power.

attacks.name: Fake Out
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Ambush
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavorText: Its lithe muscles allow it to walk without making a sound. It attacks in an instant.

attacks.name: Exhausted Tackle
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon. If tails, this Pokémon does 30 damage to itself.

flavorText: Adores round objects. It wanders the streets on a nightly basis to look for dropped loose change.

attacks.name: Juggling
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: It is adept at conning people. It is said to be able to create walls out of thin air by miming.

attacks.name: Follow Me
attacks.effect: Switch 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon with your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Moonblast
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done by attacks from the Defending Pokémon is reduced by 30 (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: Its hearing is so acute it can hear a pin drop over half a mile away. It lives on quiet mountains.

attacks.name: Moonlight
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: It is said that happiness will come to those who see a gathering of Clefairy dancing under a full moon.

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.

flavorText: It is inept at turning because of its four short legs. It can only charge and run in one direction.

attacks.name: Bullet Punch
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 more damage for each heads.

flavorText: The arm-twisting punches it throws pulverize even concrete. It rests after three minutes of fighting.

attacks.name: Stretch Kick
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: The legs freely contract and stretch. The stretchy legs allow it to hit a distant foe with a rising kick.

attacks.name: Megaton Fall
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 60 damage to itself.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Stone Edge
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Explosion
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 100 damage to itself.

flavorText: It tumbles down mountains, leaving grooves from peak to base. Stay clear of these grooves.

attacks.name: Double-Edge
attacks.effect: This Pokémon does 20 damage to itself.

flavorText: With a free and uncaring nature, it doesn't mind if pieces break off while it rolls down mountains.

attacks.name: Flail
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage times the number of damage counters on this Pokémon.

flavorText: Found in fields and mountains. Mistaking them for boulders, people often step or trip on them.

attacks.name: Machamp Crush
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done by attacks from the Defending Pokémon is reduced by 40 (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

flavorText: Its four ruggedly developed arms can launch a flurry of 1,000 punches in just two seconds.
Its muscular body is so powerful, it must wear a power-save belt to be able to regulate its motions.
It hefts a Graveler repeatedly to strengthen its entire body. It uses every type of martial arts.

attacks.name: Earthquake
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Rock Tumble
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.

flavorText: In battle, it digs through the ground and strikes the unsuspecting foe from an unexpected direction.

attacks.name: Mine
attacks.effect: Look at the top card of your opponent's deck. Then, you may have your opponent shuffle his or her deck.

flavorText: Lives about one yard underground where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears aboveground.

attacks.name: Mind Shock
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Hug
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: It wiggles its hips as it walks. It can cause people to dance in unison with it.

attacks.name: Sinister Fog
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. Put 1 damage counter on each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Creep Show
attacks.effect: If your opponent's Active Pokémon has 3 or more damage counters on it, that Pokémon is Knocked Out.

flavorText: Hiding in people's shadows at night, it absorbs their heat. The chill it causes makes the victims shake.

attacks.name: Poison Ring
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned. That Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: It licks with its gaseous tongue to steal the victim's life force. It lurks in darkness for prey.

attacks.name: Sleep Poison
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep and Poisoned.

flavorText: Born from gases, anyone would faint if engulfed by its gaseous body, which contains poison.

attacks.name: Spacing Out
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Scavenge
attacks.effect: Discard a Psychic Energy attached to this Pokémon. If you do, put an Item card from your discard pile into your hand.

flavorText: It is always vacantly lost in thought, but no one knows what it is thinking about. It is good at fishing with its tail.

attacks.name: Swoop Across
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Once it bites, it will not stop draining energy from the victim even if it gets too heavy to fly.

attacks.name: Skill Dive
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Even though it has no eyes, it can sense obstacles using ultrasonic waves it emits from it mouth.

attacks.name: Raging Thunder
attacks.effect: This attack does 40 damage to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: A legendary Pokémon that is said to live in thunderclouds. It freely controls lightning bolts.

attacks.name: Swift
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, or any other effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Flash Ray
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from Basic Pokémon.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Swift
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness, Resistance, or any other effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Flash Ray
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks from Basic Pokémon.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Circle Circuit
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage times the number of Pokémon on your Bench.

attacks.name: Thunderbolt
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: When its electricity builds, its muscles are stimulated, and it becomes more aggressive than usual.

attacks.name: Nuzzle
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 more damage.

flavorText: It raises its tail to check its surroundings. The tail is sometimes struck by lightning in this pose.

attacks.name: Find Ice
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 3 Water Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

flavorText: A legendary bird Pokémon that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.

attacks.name: Bubble Drain
attacks.effect: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Deep Squall
attacks.effect: This attack does 130 damage minus 10 damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Berserker Splash
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to each Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's). (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Aqua Tail
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each Water Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 30 more damage for each heads.

flavorText: Rarely seen in the wild. Huge and vicious, it is capable of destroying entire cities in a rage.

attacks.name: Epic Splash
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. If either of them is tails, this attack does nothing.

flavorText: In the distant past, it was somewhat stronger than the horribly weak descendants that exist today.
If it senses danger approaching, it cloaks itself with bubbles from its mouth so it will look bigger.

attacks.name: Clamp Crush
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed and discard an Energy attached to that Pokémon.

attacks.name: Spike Cannon
attacks.effect: Flip 5 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

flavorText: Cloyster that live in seas with harsh tidal currents grow large, sharp spikes on their shells.
Its hard shell repels any kind of attack. It is vulnerable only when its shell is open.

attacks.name: Dread Launcher
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, discard 2 Water Energy attached to this Pokémon.

rules:
Mega Evolution rule: When 1 of your Pokémon becomes a Mega Evolution Pokémon, your turn ends.

Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Hyper Whirlpool
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Hydro Press
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Ember
attacks.effect: Discard a Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.

flavorText: Found near the mouth of a volcano. This fire-breather's body temperature is nearly 2,200 degrees Fahrenheit.

attacks.name: Agility
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Overrun
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

flavorText: Very competitive, this Pokémon will chase anything that moves fast in the hopes of racing it.

attacks.name: Agility
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to this Pokémon during your opponent's next turn.

flavorText: As a newborn, it can barely stand. However, through galloping, its legs are made tougher and faster.

attacks.name: Flare Bonus
attacks.effect: Discard a Fire Energy card from your hand. If you do, draw 3 cards.

attacks.name: Fire Blast
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, discard a Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Heat Typhoon
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each Fire Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 50 more damage for each heads.

rules:
Mega Evolution rule: When 1 of your Pokémon becomes a Mega Evolution Pokémon, your turn ends.

Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Flame Cloak
attacks.effect: Attach a Fire Energy card from your discard pile to this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Burning Breath
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 more damage for each heads.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Leaf Blade
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

attacks.name: Nature's Breath
attacks.effect: If there is any Stadium card in play, this attack does 30 more damage and heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Overhead Throw
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 damage to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Heavy Suplex
attacks.effect: This attack does 20 more damage for each Colorless in your opponent's Active Pokémon's Retreat Cost.

flavorText: It swings its long antlers wildly to attack. During cold periods, it hides deep in forests.

attacks.name: Absorb
attacks.effect: Heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: It tangles any moving thing with its vines. Their subtle shaking is ticklish if you get ensnared.

attacks.name: Colorful Spores
attacks.effect: Choose 3 of your Pokémon. For each of those Pokémon, search your deck for a different type of basic Energy card and attach it to that Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: X-Scissor
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

flavorText: The larger the mushroom on its back grows, the stronger the mushroom spores it scatters.

attacks.name: Blot
attacks.effect: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: Burrows under the ground to gnaw on tree roots. The mushrooms on its back absorb most of the nutrition.

attacks.name: Quiver Dance
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a basic Energy card and attach it to this Pokémon. Shuffle your deck afterward. If you attached Energy in this way, heal 40 damage from this Pokémon.

flavorText: It loves the honey of flowers and can locate flower patches that have even tiny amounts of pollen.

attacks.name: Harden
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, if this Pokémon would be damaged by an attack, prevent that attack's damage done to this Pokémon if that damage is 60 or less.

flavorText: A steel-hard shell protects its tender body. It quietly endures hardships while awaiting evolution.
For protection, it releases a horrible stench from the antennae on its head to drive away enemies.

attacks.name: Bloom Buster
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

rules:
Mega Evolution rule: When 1 of your Pokémon becomes a Mega Evolution Pokémon, your turn ends.

Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.

attacks.name: Frog Hop
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 40 more damage.

attacks.name: Poison Impact
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep and Poisoned.

rules: Pokémon-EX rule: When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards.
